name: HKS Co., Ltd.
summary: HKS Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automobile aftermarket parts in Japan and internationally. It offers automobile aftermarket products, such as turbo kits, exhaust systems, turbochargers, original mufflers, suspensions, electronics, and others; race engines; eco-friendly and fuel efficient systems; and conversion kits for converting a normal gasoline vehicle into CNB Bi-fuel system vehicle. The company also engages in developing and selling light sport aircraft engines, as well as in the contract and original equipment manufacturing business. HKS Co., Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Fujinomiya, Japan.
